title: Countless houses destroyed in Qolweni blaze
description: PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS AND VIDEOS - A massive...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Video","html":"Video"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS AND VIDEOS - A massive fire in Qolweni, Plettenberg Bay started shortly after 16:00 today Sunday 31 August.","html":"PLETTENBERG BAY NEWS AND VIDEOS - A massive fire in Qolweni, Plettenberg Bay started shortly after 16:00 today Sunday 31 August."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Countless houses were destroyed in the blaze along the N2 and an electrical box exploded with the blast heard kilometres away."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Hundreds of people ran around salvaging what possessions they could.","html":"Hundreds of people ran around salvaging what possessions they could."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"There are no indications yet of how the fire started and if there were any injuries.","html":"There are no indications yet of how the fire started and if there were any injuries."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Firefighters were still on the scene at about 5:10 pm and Bitou municipality was controlling the traffic along the N2.","html":"Firefighters were still on the scene at about 5:10 pm and Bitou municipality was controlling the traffic along the N2."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Many sightseers gathered along the Plettenberg Bay side of the N2.","html":"Many sightseers gathered along the Plettenberg Bay side of the N2."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The firemen on the scene tried to contain the blaze but an hour later the fire was still burning out of control.","html":"The firemen on the scene tried to contain the blaze but an hour later the fire was still burning out of control."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Videos - Chris van Gass: Houses burning in Qolweni"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Qolweni residents salvaging whatever possessions they could:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Supplied video: Alewyn Malan"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
